seoTitle: Taren Point vs Tarlo — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Taren Point and Tarlo. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Taren Point vs Tarlo: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Taren Point and Tarlo.
heading: Taren Point vs Tarlo — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Taren Point, New South Wales and Tarlo, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tarlo has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Taren Point (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Taren Point or Tarlo safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Taren Point has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Tarlo scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Taren Point scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Tarlo scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Taren Point or Tarlo?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tarlo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
